org.createOrgDescription: Create a new organisation to manage keys, borrowers, and team members. You will be the owner.
org.orgNameHint: This will be the name of your housing cooperative or organisation.

login.captchaFailed: CAPTCHA verification failed. Please try again.
login.codeSentBody: We sent an email to {email}. Enter the code here or tap the button in the email to continue.
login.checkSpam: If you don't see the email, check your spam or junk folder.

errors.securityFailed: Security verification failed. Please try again.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.sendFailed: Could not send email. Please try again.
errors.codeExpired: Code has expired. Request a new code.
errors.invalidCode: Invalid code. Please check that you entered the correct digits.

confirmed.heading: Login Successful!
confirmed.redirecting: Redirecting you to the dashboard in a moment...

completeProfile.heading: Complete your profile
completeProfile.noEmail: Could not find your email. Please log in again.

activeLoans.borrowersDescription: Manage borrower contacts and track borrowed keys
activeLoans.overdueDescription: {total, plural, one {Overview of # active loan by due date} other {Overview of # active loans by due date}}

charts.barDescription: Breakdown of key status by type

keys.emptyDescription: Get started by creating your first key type for this organisation
keys.quickStep1: Create a key type (e.g., "A" for apartment keys)
keys.quickStep3: Start tracking who borrows each key
keys.tableDescription: Manage key types in your organization
keys.labelWarning: Labels can't be changed later. To edit a key type, use the ⋯ menu on its row.

settings.heading: Settings
settings.orgPageDescription: Manage your organization and add or remove members
settings.orgOwnerOnly: Only organization owners can edit the name
settings.membersConfirmLeave: Are you sure you want to leave this organization?
settings.inviteDescription: Send an invitation to join your organization
settings.inviteRoleMemberDesc: Can manage keys and issue loans
settings.inviteRoleAdminDesc: Can manage keys and invite members
settings.deleteDescription: Permanently delete this organization and all of its data. This action cannot be undone.
settings.deletePrereq1: All other members must leave the organization first
settings.deletePrereq2: You must be the last remaining member
settings.deletePrereq3: All data including keys, borrowers, and loan history will be deleted
settings.deleteWarning: All data related to {name} will be permanently deleted.
settings.deleteActiveLoansWarning: Active Loans will be permanently lost
settings.deletePressEnter: Press Enter to confirm deletion once you've typed the name
settings.accessDescription: Manage the areas that keys grant access to (e.g. Port, Basement, Garage)
settings.accessConfirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete {name}?
settings.accessAssociatedWarning: {count, plural, one {This area is associated with # key type. That association will be removed.} other {This area is associated with # key types. Those associations will be removed.}}

issueKey.stepSelectKeysDesc: Choose one or more keys to issue to the borrower
issueKey.stepBorrowerDesc: Type a name to search or enter a new one.
issueKey.stepLendingDesc: Set due date, notes, and verify ID
issueKey.stepConfirmDesc: Review the details and confirm the key issue
issueKey.verifyIdCheckbox: I have verified the borrower's ID
issueKey.validationSelectKey: Please select at least one key to issue.
issueKey.validationIdRequired: ID verification is required to issue keys.
issueKey.successBody: {count, plural, one {# key issued to {name}} other {# keys issued to {name}}}

onboarding.skipDialogBody: You can set up your keys later, but you won't be able to track key lending until you do.
onboarding.step1DescExisting: Update your organization name if needed, or continue to the next step.
onboarding.step1DescNew: What's the name of your housing cooperative or organization?
onboarding.step2Description: Define the areas that keys can provide access to (e.g., Port, Laundry, Basement).
onboarding.step2ErrorMinOne: Please add at least one access area
onboarding.step3Description: Choose labels for your keys. Expand the sections you need.
onboarding.step3CommonLettersDesc: Pick letters that label your common-area keys.
onboarding.step3NextStepHint: You'll specify the number of copies for each type in the next step
onboarding.step3ErrorMinOne: Please select at least one key label
onboarding.step3ErrorExistsApartment: "{label}" already exists in Apartment Keys series
onboarding.step3ErrorInvalidRange: Invalid series range (must be 1-9999, from ≤ to)
onboarding.step3ErrorFillBothFields: Please fill both "from" and "to" fields for apartment keys, or leave both empty to skip
onboarding.step3ErrorDuplicates: Duplicate labels found: {labels}. Each key label must be unique.
onboarding.step3LetterHintZ: Z is the default prefix in Swedish housing cooperatives. Change it if your cooperative uses a different letter.
onboarding.step3LetterHintP: P is often used for parking or storage room keys.
onboarding.step3LetterHintB: B is commonly used for basement or storage keys.
onboarding.step3LetterHintG: G is often used for garage or gate keys.
onboarding.step3LetterHintT: T is commonly used for technical room keys.
onboarding.step3LetterHintF: F is often used for front door or hallway keys.
onboarding.step3PrefixTooltip: Z is the most common prefix in Swedish housing cooperatives. You can change it to any letter, or leave it empty for plain numbers (101, 102…).
onboarding.step3SeriesHint: Example: Prefix "Z", From 1, To 14 → creates Z1, Z2, ... Z14 (14 keys)
onboarding.step3ApartmentDesc: Most cooperatives use Z1–Z14 format, but you can customize the prefix or use pure numbers.
onboarding.step3LetterUsedAsPrefix: {letter} is used as apartment keys prefix
onboarding.step4Description: How many physical copies do you have for each key?
onboarding.reviewDescription: Review your setup before creating the keys.
onboarding.doneDescription: Your key management system is ready. Redirecting you to the keys page...

borrowerForm.emailTaken: This email is already registered with another borrower
borrowerForm.emailPlaceholderWarning: This is a placeholder email. Please update with real email when possible.
borrowerForm.purposePlaceholder: Describe why they need access to keys (optional)
borrowerForm.searchHint: Start typing to search existing borrowers or create a new one.
borrowerForm.searchMinChars: Type at least 2 characters to search existing borrowers.
borrowerForm.searchNoMatch: No matches. Press Enter or click New to create this borrower.
